docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LANDIS, GREG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAKELA-LUCAS, LINDA $1,884.19 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,899.19 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT MAKELA-LUCAS, LINDA
